title: Evangelion Yuru Shito
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Yuru Shito!             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 01, 2015 7:02 pm tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) These little buggers are adorable if you haven't seen 'em. I think the "yuru" stands for shaking or rocking, though it maybe it could be a funny pun for "yurushi" (forgiveness), too. :)

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu Apr 02, 2015 7:52 pm Yuruart's take on Eva has been around since at least 2013 and there was also this earlier topic . It's nice to see something other than the characters getting a lighthearted take. I loaded up on a bunch of Yurushito stuff when I visited JPN last October.

[]:             Quote Post by honsou » Fri Apr 03, 2015 4:31 pm I always loved cute pictures of Angels and MP Evas

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Apr 03, 2015 4:53 pm AR-99 wrote: Yuruart's take on Eva has been around since at least 2013 and there was also this earlier topic .

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Apr 03, 2015 10:51 pm ^They're document folders for Japanese paper sizes. I mostly have A4 size; the Young Ace giveaways are B5 I believe. I owe the forum the latest pics from my trip and other Eva hauls, been so busy since I got back.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Apr 04, 2015 3:18 am AR-99 wrote: ^They're document folders for Japanese paper sizes. I mostly have A4 size; the Young Ace giveaways are B5 I believe.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sat Apr 04, 2015 2:49 pm I don't know honestly. What people do with anime merch once they take it home is up to them. Although I'd think that if you're a student without that much disposable income and you're going for utility and something you like, why not use it? Professionally is another story and otaku could probably swing towards either actual use or non-use. The Japanese seem to love the things and sadly for me, have been producing less Eva shitajiki as time has gone on and have been cranking out clear files instead (conversely there were more shitajiki when the series came out vs. clear files). I snagged 44 Eva clear files on my trip, 28 alone from the main Evastore, and out of the entire group several are Yurushito.

Article: Evangelion Yuru Shito
49 pm I don't know honestly. What people do with anime merch once they take it home is up to them. Although I'd think that if you're a student without that much disposable income and you're going for utility and something you like, why not use it? Professionally is another story and otaku could probably swing towards either actual use or non-use. The Japanese seem to love the things and sadly for me, have been producing less Eva shitajiki as time has gone on and have been cranking out clear files instead (conversely there were more shitajiki when the series came out vs. clear files). I snagged 44 Eva clear files on my trip, 28 alone from the main Evastore, and out of the entire group several are Yurushito.
